description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish that can be triggered manually or on a published release. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment, checking out the repository, setting up .NET 9.0, cleaning and restoring dependencies, building and testing the project, packing and publishing the GUI, and archiving the release. Finally, it should publish the GUI to GitHub and push the NuGet packages to NuGet.org using provided API keys.
